name: Wilton Chocolate Buttercream Icing
recipeInstructions:
Note: Clear butter and clear almond extracts can be included with or substituted for the vanilla. Flavorings can be up to a total of 2 t.
1. Sift the powdered sugar and meringue powder into a large mixing bowl and set aside.
2. Cream shortening, butter, flavorings, and water in a separate bowl until smooth.
3. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the creamed mixture.
4. Mix on medium speed until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
5. Blend for an additional minute or so until creamy.
